ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the customer resides */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "investment_exp" INTEGER /* Investment experience level of the customer */,
  "expected_fund_size" REAL /* Expected fund size for investment */,
  "residual_proportion" REAL /* Residual proportion of the investment */,
  "freq_of_investment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of investment */,
  "portfolio_driver" TEXT /* Driver of the investment portfolio */,
  "risk_profile" INTEGER /* Risk profile of the customer */,
  "return_profile" INTEGER /* Return profile of the customer */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment strategy */,
  "investment_history" TEXT /* History of the customer's investments */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the customer */,
  "investment_goals" TEXT /* Investment goals of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_profiles_risk_profile FOREIGN KEY ("risk_profile") REFERENCES risk_profiles ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_profiles_return_profile FOREIGN KEY ("return_profile") REFERENCES return_profiles ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_profiles_portfolio_driver FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_driver") REFERENCES portfolio_drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_profiles_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_profiles_freq_of_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("freq_of_investment_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("freq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "freq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "freq_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_profiles" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk profile */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_profiles" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return profile */,
  "return_name" TEXT /* Name of the return profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment profile */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "advisor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the financial advisor */,
  "performance_metrics" REAL /* Performance metrics of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES investment_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target customer segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor assignment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial advisor */,
  "assignment_start" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_end" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the customer */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the risk assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
